title: Sync corpus fixtures from tree-sitter v0.26.5
description: Copy the full test corpus files from the tree-sitter v0.26.5 tag at ~/code/references/tree-sitter and from each language grammar repo. Run the corpus tests against them to ensure we haven't been testing against stale or modified fixtures. Check for any differences with our current vendored copies. Reference: tree-sitter CLI v0.26.5 confirmed installed.
